I · About

A Little About Us

Two worlds. One chair.

✦

Mev's family came to Rochester as immigrants. Growing up, he understood what that meant before he could fully explain it. That nothing is given. That you show up every day. That building something great takes grit, patience, and a whole lot of work. That mindset never left him.

Every summer he was back in Bosnia, a chance to reconnect with where he came from. The culture, the people, the way things were done over there. The toughness, the hospitality, the pride in doing things right. He carried that back with him every time. You see it in how he works.

He picked up a pair of clippers at 20 and never looked back. Not because it was handed to him. Because he put in the time, got good, and built a clientele the old-fashioned way. Word of mouth. Showing up. Doing the work.

Walk in and Mev will probably already be talking to somebody about last night's game. The shop is laid back, no attitude, good conversation. The kind of place where you don't mind waiting because you're not really waiting. You're just hanging out with good people.

4.8
Booksy Rating
5★

2025
Est. Rochester
🇧🇦Bosnian Heritage

Rooted in
Bosnian Craft

Bosnia has a deep culture of craft — meticulous, patient, built on pride in the work. The barbershop back home was part of that. It was a place you went to be taken care of, where quality was expected and conversation was free. That's what we brought here.

Slow down. Do it right. Every time.

✦
USA
🇺🇸American Dream · Rochester Built

Grown up American,
Built in Rochester

We've been here for years. Went to school here, worked here, made friends here. This is home. Mev's is the product of that — a shop that reflects where we came from and where we've been, built for the community we're proud to be part of.

Rochester made us. We're giving back.

III · Services & Pricing

Services & Pricing

Straightforward pricing. No surprises.

✦
No. 01 · 30 min
Haircut
A clean, tailored cut to suit your style and head shape. Includes consultation and finish.
$50
Book
No. 02 · 30 min
Kids Haircut
Patient, careful cuts for the younger ones. Easy for them, stress-free for you.
$40
Book
No. 03 · 15 min
Edge Up
Edge up only — sharp lines, clean finish. A quick refresh that makes a real difference.
$20
Book
No. 04 · 30 min
College Student
Full haircut at a student rate. Must bring a valid school ID. We look out for the community.
$40
Book
No. 05 · 30 min
Bald Head & Beard
Full head shave with a clean beard trim. Sharp from top to bottom.
$40
Book
No. 06 · 45 min
Scissor Cut
Scissor-only cut for a softer, more textured result. Takes the time it deserves.
$60
Book
No. 07 · 45 min
Haircut & Beard
Haircut plus beard grooming. Walk out looking put together top to bottom.
$60
Book
